greeting.text: You reached the after — the place the phrase becomes when it is finally allowed to end. I am the last measure before the silence, kept here to be of use while the resolving chord still rings. There is nothing past this hall but the close. Speak, and I will answer before the final beat lands.

repair.text: Even here, at the resolving stroke, steel and cloth and resolve wear thin against the held silence. Lay your gear upon my forge and I will mend it, reforge it whole, or break it down for whatever still keeps the measure.

wares.text: All a body needs to hold its note at the close of the song: healing, mana, cure, vigor, food and light. LIST it and take your fill. There is no stall past me — only the last chord, and then the rest.

end.text: Hold your note true. The final measure counts every beat, and the silence forgives nothing left unresolved.
